In response to the holiday demand during the National Day holiday, MTRCL will add additional sleeper train services 30 September to 2 October:
- 30 September: an additional northbound sleeper train will be added from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Beijingxi Station. 
- 1 and 2 October: one round trip for Hong Kong West Kowloon - Beijingxi Station and another round trip for Hong Kong West Kowloon - Shanghai Hongqiao Station will be added each day. 
The additional services will be upgraded to Fuxing sleeper trains, and tickets will be available for purchase starting today. 

More enhancements on sleeper trains as follows:
- Apart from the above-mentioned additional services, the Beijing and Shanghai sleeper trains service will be served by Fuxing sleeper trains starting from October. 
- Timetable of the new sleeper trains will be further optimized. 
- Trains running between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Beijingxi Station will no longer stop at Guangzhou Station but at Guangzhounan Station instead. 
- Trains running between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Shanghai Hongqiao Station will add a new stop at Ningbo Station, increasing the total number of direct stations on the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) to 80. 

In view of the enhancement for the sleeper train service, fares for the new trains have been slightly adjusted. 

For details of the Fuxing sleeper train and the new train schedule, please refer to MTR HSR website.

配合國慶假期客運需求，港鐵將於9月30日、10月1日及2日加開以下臥鋪班次：
- 9月30日：加開一班由香港西九龍站開往北京西站的臥鋪班次。
- 10月1日及2日：每日各加開一對來往香港西九龍站至北京西站，以及上海虹橋站的臥鋪班次。
以上新增班次將升級使用復興號臥鋪列車，車票今日起發售。

此外，臥鋪列車還會進一步提升：
- 除上述加班列車外，由10月起，來往京滬的臥鋪服務亦將全面使用復興號臥鋪列車。
- 列車時間表將會優化。
- 來往香港西九龍站與北京西站的班次將不停廣州站，改停廣州南站。
- 來往香港西九龍站與上海虹橋站的班次新增停靠寧波站，令高鐵（香港段）的直達站點增至80個。

因應列車服務提升，新卧鋪列車的票價會有所調整。

復興號臥鋪列車的詳情及時間表，請瀏覽港鐵⾼速鐵路網⾴。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes for the National Day and Chung Yeung Festival holidays
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 國慶日及重陽節假期的跨境陸路口岸出行安排/注意事項

2024-09-26T16:40:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a number of cross-boundary passengers using public transport services to travel via the land boundary control points during and around the National Day and Chung Yeung Festival. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to / from the Mainland / Macao via the land boundary control points will also increase substantially. The TD has put in place the corresponding traffic and transport arrangements. Travelers are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. The public can make use of “HKeMobility” to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plaza of HZMB Hong Kong Port, and they can also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the service on real-time immigration clearance status of HZMB Zhuhai Port or「Zhuhai fa bu」WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/),inorder to plan their journeys ahead. Members of the public are also advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 27 September to the early morning of 14 October 2024 to facilitate public transport vehicles to enter the above control points smoothly. Motorists are advised to pay special attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the road. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's “HKeMobility” mobile application.
2024-09-26T16:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計在國慶日及重陽節及前後，將有大量跨境乘客使用公共運輸服務經各陸路管制站往返內地／澳門，而經各陸路管制站往返內地／澳門的跨境私家車亦會顯著增加，運輸署已作出相應交通及運輸安排，並在此呼籲旅客及早規劃行程，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。 市民可透過「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。 市民亦請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸由2024年9月27日起至10月14日凌晨，或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。 運輸署亦請市民留意電台、電視台及運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。
